name: Tropical Fruit Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Ripe Mango, peeled, pitted and cut into 1/4 inch cubes
1 medium Ripe Papaya, peeled, seeded and cut into 1/4 inch cubes
1 medium Ripe Avocado, peeled, pitted and cut into 1/4 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a medium bowl.
2. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 1 hour to allow flavors to blend.
3. Serve with grilled fish or chicken. Also good with tortilla chips.
